name: Sweet and Sour Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Green Bell Pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop the green bell pepper after seeding it.
2. Prepare the Basic Meatball recipe as directed and set aside.
3. In a large skillet, mix the cornstarch and brown sugar until combined.
4. Stir in the pineapple tidbits with their syrup, soy sauce, and vinegar.
5. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and boils.
6. Add the cooked meatballs to the skillet; cover and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the chopped green bell pepper; cover and simmer until the pepper is crisp-tender, about 5 minutes.
8. Serve.
